sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90159" key="prosthqi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προστηθ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n90159.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ball of the foot</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στῆθος</foreign>), ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:198" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">198</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
